results.name: exact resolver blocks missing, ambiguous, wrong-case, and production-only keys
target guard requires exact target and explicit apply confirmation
graph replay is deterministic and creates no second-run duplicates
content change creates a revision without changing notice identity
database assigns revision ordinals under a per-notice lock
database replay preserves canonical metadata and review state
projection preview rejects an approval for a stale revision
schema rollback drops trigger tables before trigger functions

environment guard is created once in 001 and remains immutable
review RPC resolves an idempotent retry before lifecycle rejection
zero match remains source-result evidence and never deletes notices

numeric public scholarship route rejects unverified preview rows
